content.problemStatement: Complete the lcp function to return the Longest Common Prefix among all the strings in the trie.
constraints:
- $1 \leq T \leq 100$
- $1 \leq N \leq 100$
- $1 \leq M \leq N\cdot(N-1)/2$
- $1 \leq u_i, v_i \leq N$
- $u_i \neq v_i$ for each $1 \leq i \leq M$.
- The sum of $N$ over all test cases won't exceed $100$.
content.inputFormat:
- The first line of input will contain a single integer $N$, denoting the number of string.
- Following $N$ lines contain $N$ strings.
content.outputFormat: Output the Longest Common Prefix for all the strings.
